description: CompositionPurple polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed and tipped collar with a buttoned rugged chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, branding on left sleeve and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryFlaunt your youthful attitude in style with this purple t-shirt from basics. This plain T-shirt with a rugged placket enhances your regal style statement, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this T-shirt with jeans or chinos and suede shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
